summary: This source is a peer-reviewed epidemiological paper co-authored by Julie E. Buring, analyzing data from the Physicians' Health Study. It investigates whether baseline plasma levels of beta-carotene modify the effect of beta-carotene supplementation on cancer risk. Because it is a collectively authored scientific report, it does not contain Buring's individual voice, personal frameworks, or distinct mental models, resulting in an empty extraction for those fields.
